name: ETL_Identify_Inactive_Customers
description: Identify customers without transactions in the last 90 days for retention campaign

steps.name: LOAD_CUSTOMER
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    customer_name,
    customer_email,
    customer_phone,
    customer_segment
FROM ${CUSTOMER_TABLE}
WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Load customer master data, selecting only relevant columns and filtering out null customer IDs

steps.name: LOAD_TRANSACTION
steps.sql:
SELECT
    transaction_id,
    customer_id,
    transaction_date,
    amount
FROM ${TRANSACTION_TABLE}
WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
  AND transaction_date IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Load transaction data, selecting required columns and excluding records with null customer_id or transaction_date

steps.name: FILTER_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    transaction_date
FROM LOAD_TRANSACTION
WHERE transaction_date >= CAST(${REFERENCE_DATE} AS DATE) - INTERVAL 90 DAYS
steps.description: Filter transactions that occurred within the last 90 days from the reference date

steps.name: DEDUP_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS
steps.sql:
SELECT DISTINCT customer_id
FROM FILTER_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS
WHERE customer_id IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Deduplicate customer_ids from recent transactions to get unique set of active customers

steps.name: JOIN_CUSTOMERS_WITHOUT_TRANSACTIONS
steps.sql:
SELECT /*+ BROADCAST(b) */
    a.customer_id,
    a.customer_name,
    a.customer_email,
    a.customer_phone,
    a.customer_segment
FROM LOAD_CUSTOMER a
LEFT ANTI JOIN DEDUP_RECENT_TRANSACTIONS b
    ON a.customer_id = b.customer_id
WHERE a.customer_id IS NOT NULL
steps.description: Identify customers that did not have any transaction in the last 90 days using left anti join with broadcast hint on the small deduplicated set

steps.name: SAVE_TARGET
steps.sql:
SELECT
    customer_id,
    customer_name,
    customer_email,
    customer_phone,
    customer_segment
FROM JOIN_CUSTOMERS_WITHOUT_TRANSACTIONS
steps.description: Write the final list of inactive customers to the target table
